reviews.review_title: App has come to an end!
reviews.review_description: Entered lobby on my Quest3s and was greeted with a message that VR app has come to an end! A message indicates to go to the PC website to manage account, but it doesn't allow a log in and throws up message to contact them through a link. They need to be more transparent with a way to download your data and be able to close your account.

Only media available is Liverpool matches. The devs said in a reply to a review FIVE YEARS AGO that they would "be adding more in the coming months." Nothing has changed since I tried this game seven years ago, other than fewer players playing the game at this point.  Meh.

I was trying to set up an account on this app I was at the email part I pressed it but I didn't have it I tryed redoing it 3-4 times but still I don't have it. I will not be playing until you update it

I used to live this app, I met loads of great people through it and now, nobody uses it all.  Often I've been on there and I'm the only one, ON THR ENTIRE PLANET that is using it!
It's crazy considering how nice the locations are and the potential for it is second to none. Please developers, update this app and market it better. It's definitely worth a revamp (i.e. room building options, better avatars, Facebook chat integration perhaps?) and definitely worth investing in. 

👍

Very Toxic  Community and a lot of scammers and con artists present. Also a meeting place for exchanging NUDITY PICS. I Used it for only two days and deleted my account just in the nick of time. A series of very creepy and STONED persons encounters in their spaces was the moment to delete this social media VR app not a moment to soon. In general Social Media VR apps and communities who are not MODERATED or MONITORED are very dangerous. I hope the Apple Vision Pro arrives very soon because Marky Zucky does not care about morality, safety and friendly communities.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that you had a bad experience. The majority of our community are great people, but when you come across a bad actor, block and report them to us so that we can take action. We investigate every report. If you have any other questions, email feedback@vtime.net

reviews.review_title: No earrings, unable to teleport to areas
reviews.review_description: Hi. I created my avatar (which was time-consuming) and didn't see ANY accessories like earrings, etc... I sat by a fireplace and observed tents with bedding nearby. I wasn't able to teleport to ANY area within the scene. Will there be anything more than merely sitting in a picturesque environment?

developer_response.body: Hey! vTime XR is currently a seated experience that allows you to chat with people fro around the world. If you need help connecting with others, email feedback@vtime.net or head to the how-to section on our website. I will share your feedback about earrings with the team.

reviews.review_description:
app troppo limitata. poteva andare bene su un oculus go, ma sul quest2 essere costretti a stare seduti è deprimente, inoltre il fatto di trovare solo gente che parla inglese la rende per me del tutto inutile 

I would love to have levels where I can move and see the whole body walking

developer_response.body: Hey Serpe! Thanks for the feedback. I'll share it with the team.

reviews.review_description: Vtime is great fun, love being able to chat with friends and family. It would be great if VTime could get new locations and be interactive with the environment.  But for a simple and free social place it's fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! It's great to hear that you're enjoying the app. Keep an eye out for updates with new destinations!

reviews.review_description: This is a really lovely app to switch off from life and chat with random people (or friends). However I feel very strongly that children shouldn’t be allowed to use this app. You are speaking in real time to grown ups and the conversations are at time unfiltered with some adults enjoying downtime and thus might be drunk etc. Children of 12 or even younger suddenly appear to chat in adult groups and it’s just entirely inappropriate. That being said the grown up conservations have been excellent. The locations are lovely and I look forward to more being added. What would make this app 5* is to stop children under 18 using it and allow us to stream movies and TV shows to the outdoor cinema. So we can enjoy films with our friends. The sports pre-loaded videos are completely dull and not enjoyable unless you like football. Great app. Please developers if you can add movies to allow us to stream our own and remove children I will give you 5*! Thank you developers!

developer_response.body: Hello! Really happy to hear that you're enjoying the app. Users need to be aged 16 and over to use the app, so if you come across users below that age, let us know so that we can take action. Just select the user, choose 'block', and you'll be sent an email asking if you wish to report that user. We keep reports confidential. Thanks for sharing your suggestions too! They will be shared with the team.

reviews.review_description:
Great ap.  Free with no catches. Solid all the way around.  I appreciate people not being able to just jump into a room. 
BUT
More of a wish, than a complaint. I wish there was a way to meet other like minded people in this other through random luck.  Groups or communities.  Find others with similar backgrounds or interests.  

Seemingly the only way to converse with other people is IRL friends with VR of course or through Random luck.  Best I can figure is you randomly ask someone to join your group or ask to join theirs.  Hoping you have something in common, not knowing what they are even discussing atm..  

I only tried this for a couple hours, So I could have missed something, but I dont think I did.  If this is the case, I feel that would keep many, myself included from using it.  As luck has it, everyone I know with VR has PSVR or sparingly use their Index.  So, luck of the draw for me i guess

For instance, It was my hope to possibly meet other LBGTQ VR users in my age bracket or other fans of movies and gaming in my age range.  Doesnt seem like thats the case. Bummer

Social app vTime has arrived for Quest! This app launched in 2015 on Samsung Gear VR and later on Rift and Oculus Go.
There are many high quality animated environments to choose from, plus you can upload your own 360° photos. 
It's a great app for just sitting back and talking with others throughout the world. Don't expect to be able to play any games together (there are other apps for that).
I've personally made long-term friends in vTime who I've also met in real life. In 2017, I took a world tour and traveled to Australia, Dubai and throughout the U.S. meeting friends in person who I had met in vTime.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, Mike! It's been a pleasure having you on the network since it began!

reviews.review_description: A weirdo will skip in..

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry to hear that you've met some bad actors. If you meet anyone who makes you feel uncomfortable, block them immediately so you don't have to see them again. You'll be sent an email asking if you wish to report that user. All reports are treated confidentially, so let us know if there's a user we need to take action with.

reviews.review_title: My favorite place to go on a covid world
reviews.review_description:
I like the way this decreases one’s sense of isolation. As a psychiatrist I have been advising this as a therapy for people who are shut in for various reasons. 

Might be good to have seated and movement options.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! Really happy to hear that the app is having positive effects. I'll share your feedback with the team

reviews.review_title: Great for Adults who Just Want to Chat!
reviews.review_description: This is the only social app (that I am aware of) that is pretty chill and void of little kids!  I've only been using it for about a month, but I've met some very nice people who just want to chat.  I highly recommend it!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! Really happy to hear that you're enjoying the app.

reviews.review_description:
This game is not like Venues or other social platform games where you can see everyone's avatar and immediately chat. You have to either know someone already who you invite prior  or try to find someone from a random floating load of avatars. The environments are cool and immersive but don't bother exploring these places expecting to meet various people there because you're totally on your own! 
The fact you can't even teleport anywhere or basically do anything with your avatar is ridiculous! If you could explore the environments a little then that would make it more bearable. 
This is simply for one on one chat only (3 people max actually) 
Biggest letdown in the history of gaming!

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear the app wasn’t what you were expecting. vTime XR is different from apps such as Venues. It's the place to go for immersive chats with friends or new people from around the world. Unlike other apps where you meet people in an environment, in vTime, you invite people to join you or ask to join other people's chats so you have control over your conversations. You can meet with friends or turn on random match to connect with the wider community. I’ll pass your suggestions on to the team.

reviews.review_description: Love this app as it gives you the option to meet in a smaller environment.

developer_response.body: Thanks for an awesome review! vTime XR is all about good conversation and we're glad you're enjoying it.

reviews.review_title: This is by far my favorite social app!
reviews.review_description: This is the first time I've tried vTime since getting my new Quest 2.  This is by far my favorite social app bar none!   The environments are amazing and many breathtaking.  I've met so many cool people from around the world too.  The app is easy to maneuver through and not complicated like a lot of the other social apps (don't even try to Altspace unless you're a rocket scientist).   I'm hoping for more movie environments and the ability to upload our own content, like personal home movies or youtube movies we produce ourselves.   Great app, can't wait as it developes more environments and app upgrades.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! If you have any suggestions, email feedback@vtime.net and let us know.

reviews.review_title: In the right direction but not there yet
reviews.review_description:
Big minus point is you can't interact with things. For meeting new people, I feel Facebook venues app on Quest headset does it better, vtime however will allow cross platform. 

The normal flow for me is to become friends with a stranger, and if you don't fancy talking and revealing about your real life, you can  enjoy activities together like a bus tour or movies in Alcove, table tennis in Eleven,  multiplayer games or djing etc. .Right now vtime only offers sitting and looking at scenery.

developer_response.body: Hey Bubblytea! Thanks for your feedback. We appreciate you taking the time to share your suggestions and I'll share them with the team. If you have any other ideas or need any help, email feedback@vtime.net and let us know.

reviews.review_description: I just love the virtual location options within this app. I would love being able to read a nice novel from my kobo or kindle app while being surrounded by a nice virtual view instead of just being confined to my living room if ever there is nobody available to chat.

reviews.review_title: Really like but a few things.
reviews.review_description:
The environments, avatar, and social aspect is awesome! But a few things that would make this really really good.

- increase 4 player limit to 6 maybe
- Allow local DLNA content to play on tv screens
- Have some props to play with to make it more entertaining or some games to play

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and for your review! I'll share all of your suggestions with the team.
